---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior in gm2tiled
title: 'bug: [Short description]'
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

### 🐛 Problem Description

Provide a clear description of the issue:
- `gm2tiled` version (run `gm2tiled --version`)
- Game being converted (Undertale / Deltarune Chapter X / other)
- Type of issue: crash / wrong output / missing data / other

---

### 📝 Steps to Reproduce

1. Command used:
   ```bash
   gm2tiled --input /path/to/data.win --output /tmp/out --rooms room_name
   ```
2. What happened?
3. Operating system (e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11)

---

### ✅ Expected Result

What should have happened?

---

### 📄 Actual Result / Logs

Paste any error output here:

```text
// error message or stack trace
```

---

### 📎 Additional Information

- `data.win` format (GMS1 / GMS2)?
- Which room(s) trigger the issue?
- Any workarounds tried?
